AppShell.sidebarDescription: Keep every inquiry, follow-up promise, and booked appointment visible for the whole front-desk team.
AppShell.weeklyFocusDescription: Any lead waiting longer than one day risks a missed appointment. Protect the queue before it cools off.
AppShell.automationDescription: This workspace is structured for future automations, summaries, and suggested next actions without changing your team's current process.
AppShell.topbarDescription: Track lead intake, follow-up pressure, and booking momentum from one clear operating view.

EmptyStates.noLeadsDescription: No leads yet. Add your first lead to start tracking follow-ups and bookings.
EmptyStates.noCampaignsDescription: No campaigns yet. Add campaigns when you want to compare lead quality, booked appointments, and source performance more clearly.
EmptyStates.noFilteredLeadsDescription: No leads match your current filters. Clear filters or adjust the search to broaden results.
EmptyStates.noRecentLeadsDescription: New leads will appear here as soon as they enter the pipeline.
EmptyStates.noReportDescription: Once lead activity is tracked this week, the performance summary will appear here.
EmptyStates.noChartDataDescription: Start capturing leads to unlock trend, source, and pipeline visuals.

LeadsPage.title: Lead pipeline
LeadsPage.description: Search, filter, and manage every incoming lead with clear follow-up visibility and booking progress.
LeadsPage.focusDescription: This workspace is designed to help front-desk teams move quickly without losing customer context.
LeadsPage.focusSearchDescription: Use one search bar to find names, phone numbers, emails, and service interest quickly.
LeadsPage.focusFilterDescription: Slice by status, source, and date window so the team can focus on the right conversations.
LeadsPage.focusActionDescription: Every row leads straight into the detail view for follow-up timing, notes, and handoff context.

stats.activePipelineHint: Leads still being worked by the team right now.
stats.followUpNeededAlert: There are leads already due for action.
stats.followUpNeededHealthy: The due queue looks under control right now.

NewLeadPage.title: Add a new lead
NewLeadPage.description: Capture contact details, lead source, and the next follow-up step so your team knows exactly what to do next.

LeadForm.pageDescription: Capture contact details, lead source, and the next follow-up step so your team knows exactly what to do next.
LeadForm.detailsDescription: Capture enough context for the team to follow up quickly, understand the source, and move the lead toward a booking.
LeadForm.summaryDescription: Save the lead and continue into the detail page for follow-up management.
LeadForm.contactSectionDescription: Make it easy for the team to recognize the person and reach out with confidence.
LeadForm.leadSectionDescription: Capture context that makes reporting and the next follow-up step more useful.
LeadForm.sourceSectionDescription: Keep attribution clean so owners can see what channels and campaigns are actually working.
LeadForm.followUpSectionDescription: Set the next promised action so the queue stays reliable.
LeadForm.notesSectionDescription: Add objections, timing clues, budget signals, or anything useful for a handoff.
LeadForm.fullNameHelp: Use the name your team will recognize immediately.
LeadForm.phoneHelp: Primary number for call-back or SMS follow-up.
LeadForm.emailHelp: Optional, but useful for confirmations and nurturing.
LeadForm.serviceInterestPlaceholder: Teeth whitening, skin treatment, English class...
LeadForm.serviceInterestHelp: What does the customer want to book or learn more about?
LeadForm.preferredContactTimeHelp: Optional timing preference from the customer.
LeadForm.sourceHelp: Choose the source so campaign reporting stays useful.
LeadForm.campaignHelp: Optional when you want to tie the lead to a named promotion or ad set.
LeadForm.statusHelp: Start with the stage that best matches the current conversation.
LeadForm.followUpHelp: Set the next promised action so it appears in the dashboard queue.
LeadForm.notesPlaceholder: Context from chat, preferred appointment time, budget signals...
LeadForm.notesHelp: Add budget clues, preferred timing, objections, or handoff context.
LeadForm.summaryBody: A well-tagged lead helps owners understand which channels are producing real appointment opportunities instead of just message volume.

LeadDetailForm.followUpHelp: Set the next promised contact so it shows up in the follow-up queue.
LeadDetailForm.notesHelp: Keep notes practical: customer intent, timing, objections, and what to do next.
LeadDetailForm.error: We couldn't update the lead right now. Please try again.

LeadDetailPage.description: See who this lead is, what they want, where they came from, and what the team should do next.
LeadDetailPage.summaryDescription: Captured on {date}. Use this card to understand the customer context before reaching out.
LeadDetailPage.statusHint: Current pipeline position for the team.
LeadDetailPage.sourceHint: Where this lead entered the workspace.
LeadDetailPage.serviceHint: What the customer wants to discuss or book.
LeadDetailPage.suggestedActionDescription: Use this control area to keep the dashboard reliable and handoffs clear.
LeadDetailPage.suggestedActionNew: Reach out quickly while the inquiry is still fresh, confirm the service need, and set a clear next follow-up time.
LeadDetailPage.suggestedActionFollowUp: Review the promised follow-up timing, keep the customer expectation clear, and update the status after the next touchpoint.
LeadDetailPage.suggestedActionGeneral: Keep this record current so the team always knows who owns the next step and what the customer needs next.
LeadDetailPage.contactDescription: Give the team immediate visibility into how to reach the lead and what context matters before replying.
LeadDetailPage.ownerContextValue: Protect response speed and keep the next promised action visible.
LeadDetailPage.notesDescription: Useful handoff context, customer intent, and conversation history.
LeadDetailPage.noNotes: No notes yet. Add context to keep handoffs clean and help the next staff member respond with confidence.
LeadDetailPage.timelineDescription: A lightweight CRM-style history of what has happened and what was scheduled next.
LeadDetailPage.timelineEmptyDescription: The timeline will populate as the team creates notes, follow-ups, and status changes.

LeadTable.workspaceDescription: Search, filter, and open lead records quickly so staff can take action without losing context.
LeadTable.reviewHint: Open any row to review contact details, follow-up timing, and notes.

Dashboard.pageDescription: Track new leads, follow-ups, and booked appointments in one place.
Dashboard.attentionDescription: A short action summary so staff know what to do next without digging through the full lead list.
Dashboard.recentLeadsDescription: The latest leads entering the pipeline, with just enough context to know who needs follow-up next.
Dashboard.leadsByDayDescription: A quick view of daily lead volume so owners can spot momentum changes before the week is over.
Dashboard.leadsBySourceDescription: See which channels are driving the most lead volume into the workspace.
Dashboard.statusDistributionDescription: Understand how much of the pipeline is fresh, active, booked, or at risk of being lost.

attention.followUpNeededText: Any lead waiting too long risks a missed appointment or a cold conversation.
attention.noOverdueText: No overdue follow-up is currently in the queue.
attention.suggestedActionAlert: Call or message the oldest due lead first, then clear the rest of the overdue follow-up queue before new inquiries pile up.
attention.suggestedActionHealthy: The follow-up queue looks healthy. Focus on moving new and interested leads toward booked appointments.

Reports.pageDescription: Clear business reporting for lead volume, follow-up risk, and booking performance, even before AI-generated insights are enabled.
Reports.summaryDescription: A quick operating summary for owners who want direction on lead flow, booking performance, and follow-up risk.
Reports.fullReportDescription: Deterministic reporting for demo use today, designed to become AI-generated in a future release.
Reports.futureAi: AI-generated reporting will be available in a future version.
Reports.fallbackBestSource: No clear leader yet. Keep testing the channels that bring qualified inquiries.
Reports.fallbackFollowUpRisk: No follow-up risk detected this week.
Reports.fallbackBookingPerformance: No bookings recorded this week yet.
Reports.bookingPerformanceWithCount: {count} booked appointments were recorded this week.

Reports.fallbackSuggestedActionDetailed: Speed up response time for fresh leads and review any stage where leads are stalling.

SettingsPage.title: Business settings
SettingsPage.description: Manage the workspace profile, future team controls, notification placeholders, and integration readiness from one calm operating area.

businessProfile.title: Business profile
businessProfile.description: The core information that identifies this workspace for staff and future reporting.

publicCapture.title: Public capture link
publicCapture.description: Use this no-login form link anywhere you collect demand so new inquiries land directly in the shared lead queue.

team.title: Team members
team.description: Invite flows and permission controls are planned so owners can coordinate front-desk staff and managers.
team.cardBody: Role visibility is already tracked. Next up are teammate invites, operational permissions, and clearer ownership of follow-up queues.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.description: Future controls for follow-up reminders, daily summaries, and overdue lead alerts.
notifications.dailySummaryDescription: Planned email summary for owners and managers.
notifications.followUpAlertsDescription: Planned reminders for leads due today or already late.
notifications.weeklyReportsDescription: Planned scheduled delivery of the weekly performance report.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: A clear placeholder for plan controls, billing history, and usage limits in a future release.
subscription.cardBody: Starter, Growth, and Custom plans will be managed here once billing is introduced.

integrations.title: Integrations roadmap
integrations.description: Intentional placeholders for the lead sources local businesses commonly rely on.
integrations.facebookDescription: Capture Facebook inquiries directly into the shared lead queue.
integrations.tiktokDescription: Sync TikTok campaign leads and compare booking quality by source.
integrations.websiteDescription: Route website inquiries into the same workflow as paid campaigns.
integrations.zaloDescription: Track conversations and inquiries from Zalo in the same booking pipeline.

header.tagline: Lead management for local service businesses

hero.badge: Built for spas, clinics, dental, beauty, education, and local service teams
hero.title: Turn social media leads into booked appointments
hero.subtitle: LeadOps AI helps local businesses track leads, follow-ups, campaigns, and weekly performance in one dashboard.

sources.title: All lead sources
sources.text: Facebook, TikTok, website forms, referrals, and manual entry in one place.

followUp.title: Actionable follow-up
followUp.text: Staff can see which leads need attention today before they go cold.

conversion.title: Simple conversion view
conversion.text: Owners can track booked appointments without digging through spreadsheets.

mockup.title: Dashboard preview
mockup.subtitle: A calm daily operating view for lead intake, follow-up pressure, and booking momentum.
mockup.attentionText: Leads need follow-up today. The oldest pending inquiry came from Facebook two days ago.

pain.title: The lead process breaks down before the booking happens
pain.text1: Leads are scattered across inboxes, forms, and spreadsheets, so nobody has one clear view of what came in.
pain.text2: Staff forget to follow up when messages are split across channels or handed off between team members.
pain.text3: Owners cannot see which campaign works, so ad budget gets spent without clear lead quality tracking.
pain.text4: New inquiry volume can look healthy even when actual appointments are not increasing.

features.title: Everything your team needs to move leads toward booked appointments

tracking.title: Lead Tracking
tracking.text: Capture Facebook, TikTok, website, referral, and manual leads in one place.

followUp.title: Follow-up Reminders
followUp.text: Keep overdue and due-today follow-ups visible so promising leads do not go cold.

insights.title: Campaign Source Insights
insights.text: Compare which channels produce the most leads and the best booking outcomes.

reports.title: Weekly AI-style Reports
reports.text: Summarize lead performance with business-friendly reporting that is ready for future AI upgrades.

conversion.title: Appointment Conversion Overview
conversion.text: Watch the path from inquiry to booked appointment with simple performance metrics.

workflow.title: Team-ready CRM Workflow
workflow.text: Leave clear notes, status updates, and next steps so staff can pick up where others left off.

how.title: A simple workflow for busy local service teams

capture.title: Capture leads
capture.text: Bring in inquiries from ads, website forms, referrals, or manual entry.

followUp.title: Track follow-up
followUp.text: Assign a clear status and next follow-up date so nobody forgets the lead.

convert.title: Convert to bookings
convert.text: Move qualified leads into booked appointments and keep notes organized.

review.title: Review weekly performance
review.text: See what sources, campaigns, and staff actions are driving better results.

useCases.title: Designed for local businesses that live on speed and follow-up discipline

spa.title: Spa
spa.text: Track treatment inquiries, consultation requests, and repeat follow-up opportunities without losing context.

dental.title: Dental clinic
dental.text: Keep whitening, braces, and consultation leads moving toward scheduled visits with cleaner status control.

clinic.title: Clinic / beauty center
clinic.text: Give staff one operating view for incoming messages, consultation requests, and booked appointment visibility.

education.title: Education center
education.text: Manage course inquiries, parent follow-up, and conversion from lead to consultation or enrollment call.

pricing.title: Simple plan placeholders for early sales conversations

starter.title: Starter
starter.text: For owner-operated businesses getting visibility on new leads and follow-up basics.

growth.title: Growth
growth.text: For teams that need stronger campaign tracking, more users, and reporting clarity.

custom.title: Custom
custom.text: For multi-location or higher-volume teams that need tailored onboarding and workflows.

faq.title: Common questions from local service teams

crm.question: Is this a CRM?
crm.answer: Yes. LeadOps AI is a lightweight lead-focused CRM designed around follow-up discipline, campaign visibility, and booked appointments.

integration.question: Can I use it without Facebook or TikTok integration?
integration.answer: Yes. You can still capture and manage leads manually, from forms, referrals, or any other source.

team.question: Can my team use it?
team.answer: Yes. The product is structured for owners, front-desk staff, and managers to work from one shared lead queue.

language.question: Does it support Vietnamese and English?
language.answer: Yes. The interface supports both Vietnamese and English.

ai.question: Is AI reporting available now?
ai.answer: The reporting layout is ready today, and richer AI-generated reporting is planned for a future release.

footer.description: LeadOps AI helps local service businesses turn scattered inquiries into a cleaner booking workflow.
